allow: Bash(npm --version)
Bash(git --version)
Bash(gh --version)

PowerShell(Write-Output "node: $\(\(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source\)"; Write-Output "npm: $\(\(Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source\)"; Write-Output "git: $\(\(Get-Command git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source\)"; Write-Output "gh: $\(\(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source\)")

PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe", "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:APPDATA\\npm\\node.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\fnm_multishells", "$env:USERPROFILE\\.volta\\bin\\node.exe"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; Write-Output "winget: $\(\(Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source\)")
PowerShell(winget install OpenJS.NodeJS.LTS --accept-package-agreements --accept-source-agreements --silent)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Write-Output "node: $\(node --version\)"; Write-Output "npm: $\(npm --version\)")

PowerShell($src = "C:\\Users\\usuario\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-usuario-OneDrive-Escritorio-Proyecto-CRM\\2ed57b18-3f60-449f-9bd3-ab838a64ec3c\\scratchpad\\scaffold\\crm"; $dst = "C:\\Users\\usuario\\OneDrive\\Escritorio\\Proyecto CRM"; Get-ChildItem -Path $src -Force | ForEach-Object { Move-Item -Path $_.FullName -Destination $dst -Force }; Write-Output "--- Contenido de la carpeta del proyecto ---"; Get-ChildItem -Path $dst -Force | Select-Object Name | Format-Table -HideTableHeaders)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Set-Location "C:\\Users\\usuario\\OneDrive\\Escritorio\\Proyecto CRM"; if \(Select-String -Path .env -Pattern "johndoe" -Quiet\) { Write-Output "AVISO: el .env todavia tiene la cadena de ejemplo." } else { Write-Output "OK: cadena real detectada. Probando conexion..." ; "SELECT 1;" | npx --yes prisma db execute --stdin 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 15 })

PowerShell($cands = @\("aws-0-us-west-1.pooler.supabase.com","aws-1-us-west-1.pooler.supabase.com"\); foreach \($c in $cands\) { Write-Output "=== $c ==="; try { $ips = Resolve-DnsName $c -ErrorAction Stop | Where-Object { $_.Type -eq 'A' -or $_.Type -eq 'AAAA' }; if \($ips\) { $ips | Select-Object Type, IPAddress | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String | ForEach-Object { $_.Trim\(\) } ; $r = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName $c -Port 5432 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Puerto 5432 alcanzable: $\($r.TcpTestSucceeded\)" } else { Write-Output "resuelve pero sin A/AAAA" } } catch { Write-Output "NO resuelve: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Write-Output "" })

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Set-Location "C:\\Users\\usuario\\OneDrive\\Escritorio\\Proyecto CRM"; $line = \(Select-String -Path .env -Pattern '^DATABASE_URL=' | Select-Object -First 1\).Line; if \($line -match '@\([^/]+\)/'\) { Write-Output "Host/puerto detectado: $\($matches[1]\)" }; if \($line -match 'johndoe'\) { Write-Output "OJO: sigue el ejemplo" }; Write-Output "--- Probando conexion \(SELECT 1\) ---"; "SELECT 1;" | npx --yes prisma db execute --stdin 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 12)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Set-Location "C:\\Users\\usuario\\OneDrive\\Escritorio\\Proyecto CRM"; \(Get-Content .env -Raw\) -replace 'aws-0-us-west-1','aws-1-us-west-1' | Set-Content .env -NoNewline -Encoding utf8; Write-Output "Host cambiado a aws-1. Reintentando..."; "SELECT 1;" | npx --yes prisma db execute --stdin 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 12)

PowerShell($log = "C:\\Users\\usuario\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-usuario-OneDrive-Escritorio-Proyecto-CRM\\2ed57b18-3f60-449f-9bd3-ab838a64ec3c\\scratchpad\\devserver.log"; $ok = $false; for \($i=0; $i -lt 40; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $ok = $true; break } } catch {}; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1000 }; Write-Output "Servidor responde en http://localhost:3000 : $ok"; Write-Output "--- ultimas lineas del log ---"; if \(Test-Path $log\) { Get-Content $log -Tail 12 })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $pids = $conns.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique; foreach \($p in $pids\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Detenido proceso $p \(puerto 3000\)" } catch { Write-Output "No pude detener $p : $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } } } else { Write-Output "No habia nada escuchando en el puerto 3000" }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; try { Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2 | Out-Null; Write-Output "OJO: sigue respondiendo" } catch { Write-Output "Confirmado: el servidor esta apagado." })
